title: Hooks
description: Lifecycle hooks attach logging, permission, and output handling around the same stable agent loop.

steps.content: Read package.json and summarize the scripts.
steps.annotation: UserPromptSubmit hooks run before the prompt enters the LLM call.
Extension logic is outside the core loop.
The LLM asks to use a tool.
PreToolUse hooks can block, audit, or annotate the tool call.
The handler executes only after hooks allow it.
PostToolUse hooks see the result before it returns to the model.

steps.content: The project exposes a build script that runs Next's production build.
steps.annotation: Stop hooks can run when the model no longer requests tools.
